description: A project manager needs to send the weekly status report to an enterprise customer.

nodes.task_description: Gather updates on completed tasks, upcoming milestones, and any blockers from the project team.

expected_outcome.expected: Project manager collects all necessary status updates.

nodes.task_description: Update the project's RAG status (Red, Amber, Green) and write a concise executive summary.

expected_outcome.expected: Project manager accurately reflects the project's health.

nodes.task_description: Generate the status report from a template and email it to the customer stakeholders.

expected_outcome.expected: Project manager sends a clear and professional status report.
